## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated. (Unit for pure logic, envtest for reconciler behavior.)
- [ ] `make manifests generate` run — generated files committed if changed.
- [ ] `make lint test` passing locally.
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing.
- [ ] Docs updated under `docs/docs/` if user-facing.
- [ ] Commits signed off with `git commit -s` (DCO).
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...).
